allow: Bash(sqlite3 ~/.local/share/metatv/metatv.db ".mode column" "SELECT name, media_type, category, detected_prefix, stream_url FROM channels WHERE name LIKE '#%' LIMIT 30;")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.local/share/metatv/metatv.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM channels c1 WHERE c1.name LIKE '#%' AND EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM channels c2 WHERE c2.stream_url = c1.stream_url AND c2.name NOT LIKE '#%'\);")
